sections.paragraph:
Original: עצב

Transliteration: ‛etseb

Phonetic: eh'-tseb

BDB Definition:

  1. pain, hurt, toil, sorrow, labour, hardship
    1. pain
    2. hurt, offense
    3. toil, hardship
  2. vessel, creation, object
  3. (TWOT) idol

Origin: from H6087

TWOT entry: 1666a,1667a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
